CREATE TABLE test_table_a (id UInt32, value_a String, value_b String);
SELECT * FROM test_table_a WHERE value_a != value_b;
SELECT * FROM test_table_a WHERE id != 1 AND value_a != 'gamma';
CREATE TABLE test_table_b (id UInt32, another_value String);
SELECT a.id, a.value_a FROM test_table_a AS a JOIN test_table_b AS b ON a.value_b != b.another_value WHERE a.id != b.id;
SELECT * FROM test_table_a WHERE value_a != (SELECT another_value FROM test_table_b WHERE id = 1);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table_a WHERE NOT(value_a = 'alpha' OR value_b = 'beta');
SELECT DISTINCT value_a FROM test_table_a WHERE NOT(value_a != 'delta');
SELECT value_a, value_b FROM test_table_a WHERE value_a != 'alpha' UNION SELECT value_a, value_b FROM test_table_a WHERE value_b != 'epsilon';
SELECT a.value_a, b.another_value FROM test_table_a AS a CROSS JOIN test_table_b AS b WHERE a.value_a != b.another_value;
